EmailTemplate.name: AES - Certificate Expiring Soon
EmailTemplate.subject: Time to update one of your certificates
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
TIME TO UPDATE ONE OF YOUR CERTIFICATES.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
One of your certificates is about to expire. Please renew the required documentation and follow the link below to your Alliance Portal to upload your evidence of completion.
OPEN MY ALLIANCE PORTAL
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
